## 前置讲义摘要（你必须基于这些已建立的认知继续，不要重复，要承接）

### u1-l1 项目概览：NGINX Gateway Fabric 是什么

本讲建立对 NGINX Gateway Fabric（NGF）的整体认知。核心结论：NGF 是 Kubernetes Gateway API 的开源实现，以 NGINX 为数据面，把用户声明的 YAML 翻译成 NGINX 配置。三大最小模块：（1）定位——Gateway API 用 CRD 描述流量入口，资源分三层：GatewayClass（声明由哪个控制器实现）、Gateway（监听端口/协议的实例，含 Listener）、HTTPRoute 等路由资源（经 parentRefs 挂到 Gateway，backendRefs 指向 Service）。（2）控制面/数据面分离——Go 控制面 watch 资源并生成配置，NGINX 处理真实流量，NGINX Agent 经 gRPC+mTLS 下发配置并触发 reload，实现控制路径与数据路径解耦；NGF 身份由控制器名 gateway.nginx.org/nginx-gateway-controller 标识，经 --gateway-ctlr-name 传入，须与 GatewayClass 的 controllerName 一致才被认领。（3）版本矩阵——NGF 与 Gateway API、Kubernetes、NGINX(OSS/Plus)、NGINX Agent、F5 WAF 各有兼容版本，选型先定环境再反查 NGF；生产用 latest release，尝鲜用 edge，版本号为构建期注入。
### u1-l2 目录结构与代码组织

本讲建立 NGF 仓库的顶层目录地图，作为后续所有源码讲义的「坐标系」。顶层目录分四类：入口 `cmd/`（唯一二进制 `cmd/gateway/main.go`，仅装配五个 cobra 子命令，业务全部在 `internal/`）；核心代码 `internal/`（Go 编译器强制仅仓库内可见）；API 类型 `apis/`（可对外 import 的 CRD，按 `v1alpha1`/`v1alpha2`/`waf/v1` 分版本，含自动生成的 `zz_generated.deepcopy.go`）；以及 `deploy/`（kustomize 清单）、`charts/`（Helm chart）、`examples/`、`docs/`、`tests/`（独立 go.mod，跑上游 Gateway API 一致性测试）等部署/示例/文档/测试配套目录。

全仓库最重要的代码边界是 `internal/controller` 与 `internal/framework` 之分：前者写「NGF 这个产品」（Gateway API 语义、NGINX 配置生成、CRD 翻译），按 `state/`、`nginx/`、`status/`、`provisioner/` 等子系统分目录，对应学习手册 u3~u9 各单元；后者写「如何搭一个控制器」（事件循环、控制器抽象、leader 选举、WAF 拉取等通用能力）。两者各自的 `doc.go` 用一句话钉死职责，依赖方向单向：`controller` 依赖 `framework`，不可反向。后续讲义均落在这套结构的某个具体位置。
### u1-l3 构建与本地运行方式

本讲讲清了 NGF「从源码到运行」的完整链路，分三个最小模块：Makefile 关键目标、kind 本地部署、测试与 lint 入口。核心结论是 NGF 用唯一的 Makefile 作开发入口，`make help` 即自带说明书；`make build` 经 `go build` 产出 `build/out/gateway` 二进制，并通过 `-ldflags -X main.version=...` 在链接期把版本号、遥测配置注入 `main.go` 同名变量（本地默认版本为 edge），二进制是 cobra 多子命令程序，含 controller、generate-certs、initialize、sleep、endpoint-picker 五个子命令。关键术语：Makefile 变量分可覆盖（`?=`）与不可覆盖两层，默认目标平台为 linux/amd64（macOS 需覆盖 GOOS）；控制面镜像走多阶段 Dockerfile（builder 编译、scratch 运行）；本地用 kind 模拟集群，部署链路为 create-kind-cluster → build-images → load-images → install-gateway-crds → helm-install-local，`install-ngf-local-build` 一键聚合，本地镜像必须配 `pullPolicy=Never`；质量门槛 unit-test（带 -race、-shuffle=on）、vet、lint，`dev-all` 为提交前一键全检。后续讲义将在「运行中的 Pod」内部展开 controller 的行为。
### u1-l4 安装与部署：Helm 与 Manifests

本讲讲解如何把 NGF 装进集群，含三个模块。其一，Helm chart 结构：由 Chart.yaml（元信息）、values.yaml（默认配置）、templates/（渲染逻辑）组成；values 决定「装成什么样」，templates 决定「渲染出哪些资源」。关键术语有 chart、release、CRD——上游 Gateway API 的 GatewayClass/Gateway/HTTPRoute，与 NGF 自有的 NginxProxy（数据面参数）、NginxGateway（控制面配置）。模板把 gatewayControllerName、gatewayClassName 翻译为 controller 子命令的 flag，并用 parametersRef 把 GatewayClass 指向 NginxProxy；控制器名须为 gateway.nginx.org/nginx-gateway-controller 才能认领 GatewayClass。其二，部署变体（nodeport/nginx-plus/snippets/azure/openshift/experimental/inference 等）本质是唯一 chart 上的最小 values 覆盖，examples/helm 为源、deploy/ 单文件 manifests 为产物，两条路殊途同归。其三，安装顺序铁律：Gateway API CRDs（外部）→ NGF 自有 CRDs → pre-install hook 跑 generate-certs 生成 mTLS 证书 → 控制面 Deployment，因控制器只能 watch 已注册的 CRD。部署后用 kubectl get gatewayclass 验证 Accepted=True 作为成功认领的信号。
### u1-l5 运行第一个例子：路由一个应用

本讲用官方 `cafe-example` 把 NGF 控制面「通电」，端到端跑通一条 HTTP 请求（客户端→NGINX→后端）。核心结论：一个 Gateway API 路由示例由三块拼图组成——后端应用（Deployment+Service）、Gateway（流量入口）、HTTPRoute（路由规则），靠 `gatewayClassName`、`parentRefs.name/sectionName`、`backendRefs` 互相接线，其中 `sectionName` 须匹配监听器名，路径匹配分 `PathPrefix` 与 `Exact`，请求是否放行取决于 HTTPRoute 的 `hostnames` 与监听器 `hostname` 通配是否匹配。验证用固定四步法：apply 后端→apply Gateway 并取 `GW_IP`/`GW_PORT`→apply HTTPRoute→`curl --resolve` 发请求（假域名靠 `--resolve` 在本地指向 NGINX，从而带上正确 Host 头）。NGF 把路由翻译成的 NGINX 配置最终落在数据面 Pod 的 `/etc/nginx/conf.d/*.conf`（HTTP）与 `stream-conf.d`（TCP/UDP）。最后 `examples/` 目录按「HTTP 路由基础、按协议路由、过滤器扩展、NGF 策略 CRD」四类组织，是最高效的用法检索入口，且示例版本要与所用 NGF 版本对应。
### u2-l1 命令行子命令总览

本讲剖析 NGF 唯一二进制 `cmd/gateway` 的命令装配方式：用 cobra 组装成「根命令 + 五个子命令」的命令树，根命令本身只打印帮助。其中 **`controller`** 是唯一的控制面主进程，其 `RunE` 把所有 flag 汇聚成 `config.Config` 后调用 `controller.StartManager(conf)` 交棒给 Manager（u3 主题）；其余四个为一次性辅助命令——**`generate-certs`**（自签 CA/服务端/客户端证书并写回 `server-tls`、`agent-tls` 两个 Secret）、**`initialize`**（拷贝初始配置、Plus 下生成 deployment context）、**`sleep`**（lifecycle preStop 钩子占位）、**`endpoint-picker`**（起本地 HTTP shim 转发请求给推理扩展 EPP）。运行位置各异：`controller` 在控制面 `nginx-gateway` 容器，`generate-certs` 在 Helm pre-install/pre-upgrade 的 **Job**，`initialize` 在数据面 Pod 的 **init 容器**，`endpoint-picker` 在数据面 **sidecar**，`sleep` 在 **preStop 钩子**。需区分 Job 与 init 容器。`version` 及 `telemetryReportPeriod/Endpoint/EndpointInsecure` 为**构建期注入**（ldflags `-X`）的包级变量，不经 Makefile 注入会导致 `controller` 启动失败；`getBuildInfo()` 用 `debug.ReadBuildInfo()` 补充 commit/date/dirty。
### u2-l2 controller 命令与运行时配置

本讲承接 u2-l1，把 `controller` 命令的 `RunE` 拆成三个模块讲透：flag 集、Config 结构族、flag→Config→StartManager 流转。核心结论是 `controller` 采用**三步声明模式**——flag 名常量、挂校验函数与默认值的值变量、`cmd.Flags().Var/BoolVar` 注册；借助 `stringValidatingValue` 等实现 `pflag.Value` 接口的校验型 Value，在 `Set` 阶段即「赋值即校验」，非法值在装配前就让进程退出。四十多个 flag 按职责分组（身份、数据面/TLS、metrics/健康、leader 选举、遥测、特性开关、Plus/镜像、用量上报、WAF/PLM、命名空间、EPP），注意「反向布尔」（`--xxx-disable`→`Enabled` 翻转）与「已废弃 flag」两类惯用法。配置按子系统聚类成 **Config 结构族**：顶层 `config.Config` 下挂 `MetricsConfig`/`HealthConfig`/`LeaderElectionConfig`/`ProductTelemetryConfig`/`UsageReportConfig`/`GatewayPodConfig`/`PLMStorageConfig`(指针,nil=未配置) 等，消费方各取所需；`Logger`/`AtomicLevel`/`GatewayPodConfig`(环境变量)/`Flags`(供遥测,不记敏感值) 非 flag 来源。`RunE` 为四阶段流水线：日志初始化→运行期校验与解析（含跨 flag 的 `ensureNoPortCollisions`、条件必填 `--nginx-plus` 时 `--usage-report-secret`）→单一 `config.Config{...}` 字面量装配→调用 `controller.StartManager(conf)` 交棒控制面（u3 入口）。
### u2-l3 初始化命令与证书生成

本讲讲解 NGF 两个一次性辅助子命令 `initialize` 与 `generate-certs`，二者分别跑在数据面 Pod 的 init 容器与 Helm 的 pre-install/pre-upgrade Job 中，共同保证主进程启动时「证书就位、配置就位」。`initialize` 按下标一一对应拷贝 `--source`/`--destination` 初始文件，仅在 NGINX Plus 下额外把来自 downward API 的 `POD_UID`/`CLUSTER_UID` 序列化为 `deployment_ctx.json`（Plus 授权上下文）。`generate-certs` 自签一份 RSA 2048 位、3 年有效期的 CA，再用同一 CA 签发服务端与客户端证书，分别写入 `server-tls` 与 `agent-tls` 两个 Secret，二者共享同一份 `ca.crt` 构成 mTLS 共同信任根。本讲引入的关键术语有：init 容器、mTLS、SAN、deployment context、`RequireAndVerifyClientCert` 强制客户端校验，以及控制面（gRPC 服务端，持 `server-tls`）与数据面 Agent（gRPC 客户端，持 `agent-tls`）的角色划分。核心结论：`generate-certs` 生产信任材料，`initialize` 摆好静态文件，落盘统一走 `OSFileManager` 接口。
### u2-l4 参数校验与准入式校验机制

本讲聚焦 NGF 控制面在正式工作前的参数校验安全闸，将校验拆为两层：第一层「赋值即校验」，第二层「运行期一致性校验」。涉及三个最小模块。一是校验规则集合，位于 validation.go，是一组无状态纯函数，按命名、网络地址、端口、命令参数分类，强调可单测、可复用（如资源名校验被多个 flag 共用），命名校验复用 K8s 的 DNS-1123 与 Qualified Name 规则，控制器名则焊死在 NGF 固定域名下。二是 pflag Value 自定义类型，位于 validating_types.go，包括 stringValidatingValue、stringSliceValidatingValue、intValidatingValue，通过实现 pflag.Value 接口、在 Set 方法里先校验后赋值，把非法值挡在写入门外，即「准入式校验」；slice 类型用 changed 标志实现「首次覆盖、后续追加」语义。三是跨 flag 一致性校验，用 ensureNoPortCollisions（变参与 map 去重）做端口冲突检测，置于 RunE 最前；条件必填（开启 Plus 须提供 usage-report-secret）与跨命名空间一致性（PLM Secret）分别在 RunE 和 PreRunE 完成。关键结论：默认值不经校验器、合法性由开发者自负；必填检查交给 pflag 的 MarkFlagRequired；两套端口范围区分是否允许特权端口。
### u3-l1 StartManager 全景：控制面如何被装配

`StartManager(cfg)` 是 NGF 控制面总装入口，把 `config.Config` 装配成运行进程，分六阶段：准备底座（healthChecker、controller-runtime Manager、scheme、根 ctx）→ 注册控制器并产出 `discoveredCRDs` → 构造无状态处理器（processor）与下发/状态组件（nginxUpdater、provisioner 等）→ 装配 eventHandler 与事件循环 → 注册 telemetry 并 `mgr.Start`。装配由 `create*/register*` 工厂完成，顺序由依赖关系拓扑排序决定；依赖经结构体字段注入，`eventHandlerConfig` 是依赖最多的集大成者。Runnable 由三种包装器赋予 leader 语义：`LeaderOrNonLeader`（事件循环、gRPC、provisioner，全副本跑）、`Leader`（telemetry，仅 leader）、`CallFunctionsAfterBecameLeader`（当选后打开写状态、建数据面、下发配置三把开关）。关键洞察：非 leader 副本也跑控制器与事件循环、构建图做热备，但改集群动作默认关闭、仅当选 leader 才打开，实现「热备 + 单写」多副本策略。
### u3-l2 controller-runtime Manager 与缓存

本讲下钻 createManager 如何用 manager.Options 装配 controller-runtime 的 Manager——它聚合 Cache、Client、Leader Election、Metrics/Health Server、Runnables 等所有控制器共享的基础设施。init() 将要 watch 的资源注册进 scheme（未注册者无法缓存），控制器设 NeedLeaderElection=false 让非 leader 副本也跑控制器做热备，并为 Pod status.podIP 建 field index 供后续校验 Agent 连接。核心结论是缓存裁剪：cache transform 在对象进缓存前删字段、对业务透明，分三层——DefaultNamespaces 限定命名空间（并兜底加入控制面自身 namespace）、DefaultTransform 剥所有资源 managedFields、ByObject 对 GatewayClass/Secret/ConfigMap 做字段级裁剪（无目标键命中时 Data 置 nil 但保留对象壳）。其正确性前提是 transform 保留的键集合与业务读取的键常量同源、新增键须两边同步。metrics 默认 BindAddress 为 0 即禁用、按端口 9113 开启，health 默认 8081，均可经反向布尔 flag 关闭；readyz 在首次图构建完成而非进程启动时才就绪，避免配置未下发即接流量。该 Manager 即 u3-l3 控制器注册的挂载容器。
### u3-l3 控制器注册与 CRD 存在性发现

本讲聚焦 NGF 控制面装配的「注册阶段」——在 Manager 建好后、处理器消费事件之前，决定 watch 哪些资源、启用哪些控制器。核心载体是 `ctlrCfg` 注册表单元：`objectType`（watch 谁）、`options`（predicate/field index/filter/only-metadata）、`requireCRDCheck`+`crdGVK`（是否先探测 CRD）、`name`（控制器命名，多实例同 Kind 须手写）。`registerControllers` 把所有需求收集成切片，经框架层 `controller.Register` 统一注册，后者挂谓词、配 field index、用自研 Reconciler 把资源变更翻译成 `UpsertEvent`/`DeleteEvent`。CRD 存在性发现分两层：底层 `crd.Checker.CheckCRDsExist` 用 API discovery 探测一组 GVK，并按 GroupVersion 分组把 O(n) 次调用压成 O(g) 次，「不存在」视为正常状态；上层 `filterControllersByCRDExistence` 据此过滤注册表，并对必需的 ReferenceGrant 做 v1→v1beta1 回退。特性开关（`Plus`/`ExperimentalFeatures`/`Snippets`/`PLMStorageConfig`/`InferenceExtension`）与 CRD check 构成叠加双闸门，flag 表意图、CRD 表能力，InferencePool 为靠 flag 单独控制的例外。产出的 `discoveredCRDs` 还流向变更处理器与首批事件 list 准备，是连接注册阶段与下游事件/图构建阶段的纽带。新增 watch 类型须同步更新注册表与首批 list 两处。
### u3-l4 Leader Election 与 Runnables

本讲围绕 NGF 控制面多副本如何「单写」展开，拆解三个最小模块：Leader 选举语义、Runnable 包装器、CronJob 周期任务。核心结论：多副本抢同一把以 `LeaderElectionID`/`LockName` 命名的 Kubernetes Lease 锁，仅 leader 执行改集群的动作，其余副本保持 watch 与构建图作「热备」；`LeaderElectionReleaseOnCancel:false` 防止周期任务在副本切换时被重叠执行。关键术语包括 `manager.Runnable`（长期 goroutine 抽象）与 `NeedLeaderElection()`（启动时机开关），NGF 用三个包装器表达语义：`LeaderOrNonLeader`（所有副本跑，如 eventLoop、grpcServer、provLoop）、`Leader`（仅 leader 跑，如 telemetry）、`CallFunctionsAfterBecameLeader`（当选时一次性翻开 `groupStatusUpdater.Enable`、`nginxProvisioner.Enable`、`eventHandler.enable` 三把写开关）。CronJob 基于 `wait.JitterUntilWithContext`，含 `ReadyCh` 就绪门、只加不减的 `JitterFactor` 抖动、`sliding=true`；telemetry 以 `Leader` 套 `CronJob` 实现「仅 leader、等首张图就绪后、约 24h 上报一次」。判定任务归属的通用问法：和本副本数据面 Pod 绑定用 `LeaderOrNonLeader`，集群维度写/统计用 `Leader`。
### u4-l1 自研框架：控制器抽象与过滤机制

本讲下钻 NGF 自研框架层 `internal/framework/controller`，拆解 `controller.Register` 的内部运作，回答「控制器被注册后框架如何把资源变更变成下游可消费的事件」。分三个最小模块：其一，`Register` 是框架层装配控制器的唯一入口，用函数式选项（`WithK8sPredicate`、`WithFieldIndices`、`WithNamespacedNameFilter`、`WithOnlyMetadata`、`WithNewReconciler`）把一个资源类型配置成控制器，框架不关心业务语义，新增维度无需改签名。其二，`Reconciler.Reconcile` 是「笨翻译器」，用一次 `Get` 区分增删：存在发 `UpsertEvent{Resource}`，NotFound 发 `DeleteEvent{Type,NamespacedName}`，真错误交还 controller-runtime 重试，并用 `select` 监听 ctx 防止退出阻塞。其三，事件从 API server 到 channel 穿过多层过滤：cache transform→predicate（入队前最省成本）→namespacedName filter（Reconciler 内、Get 前）；field index 不是过滤器而是缓存上的加速索引（供下游 `MatchingFields` 查询）；predicate 通过嵌入 `predicate.Funcs` 实现，`Update` 常用「old/new 任一命中即放行」防归属迁移丢事件，`AnnotationPredicate` 为现成范本。本讲产出的两种事件是下一讲事件循环的输入。
### u4-l2 事件循环与批处理（双缓冲）

本讲聚焦 internal/framework/events，讲清事件管线的「中段」：事件的收集、批处理、派发。引入三个抽象：EventBatch（[]any，批处理最小单元）、事件类型（UpsertEvent / DeleteEvent / WAFBundleReconcileEvent）、按批消费的 EventHandler 接口；eventCh 由控制器与 WAF poller 多源汇聚、由 EventLoop 单消费者读取。

核心结论：EventLoop 用双缓冲（currentBatch 与 nextBatch）做批处理——处理一批事件（通常触发一次 NGINX reload，≥200ms 且有副作用）期间，新事件堆进 nextBatch，处理完后翻转合并成一批，把 N 次资源变更压缩成远少于 N 次 reload；handler 按值拿到稳定快照，主循环只写 nextBatch，二者底层数组不重叠，故无需加锁。启动前 FirstEventBatchPreparer 主动 list/get 集群当前状态生成「首批事件」，确保首次生成配置基于完整视图、避免瞬态 404，失败则控制面启动失败。关键约定：EventBatch 允许重复事件，下游 EventHandler 必须幂等，同 Generation 的重复 upsert 不触发重配（呼应 u4-l4）。本讲止于事件被派发，事件如何生成 NGINX 配置留待 u4-l3。
### u4-l3 EventHandler：事件批次的总编排

本讲聚焦 NGF 控制面事件批次的唯一消费者 `eventHandlerImpl`，它只做编排、不做业务。主流程为：逐条 `parseAndCaptureEvent` 调 `processor.Capture*` 登记变更 → 一次 `processor.Process` 构建 `graph.Graph` → 首图构建后由 `graphBuiltHealthChecker` 置就绪 → 进入 `sendNginxConfig` 下发。核心模块 `sendNginxConfig` 按「逐 Gateway：台账登记 → 镜像确定 → 构建 `dataplane.Configuration` → 缓存 → `generator.Generate` 生成文件 → `nginxUpdater.UpdateConfig` 下发 Agent → 入队状态」推进，用 `defer reconcileWAFPollers`、`deployment.FileLock`、WAF fail-closed 保证正确性。关键设计：写状态经多生产者/单消费者的 `statusQueue` 与下发解耦，由常驻 goroutine `waitForStatusUpdates` 消费，用 `NginxConfigPushed` 区分真下发与纯状态变化；多副本单写靠 `isLeader()` 守卫、`LeaderAwareGroupUpdater` 与当选时 `enable` 重发最新图叠加保证；WAF bundle 经 `WAFBundleReconcileEvent` + `processor.ForceRebuild()` 触发重建。引入术语：编排、就绪、状态队列、Capture/Process、objectFilter、QueueObject 等，供后续讲义承接。
### u4-l4 ChangeProcessor 与状态存储

本讲下钻事件管线中 `processor` 这一环，覆盖三个最小模块：变更捕获、对象存储、changed predicate。`ChangeProcessor` 只负责登记变更与按需重建图，不碰配置生成与下发；它先逐条 `Capture*`、再一次 `Process`，配合 u4-l2 的批处理把一批事件压缩成一次重建。`Process` 受 `changed` 标志把门：无有效变更时返回 `nil`，整条「生成配置→下发」链路被跳过，这是把 N 次变更压缩成零次 reload 的核心。对象存储按 GVK 分发，`multiObjectStore` 下挂泛型 `objectStoreMapAdapter`、策略专用 `ngfPolicyObjectStore`（按 `PolicyKey` 存）、`convertingReferenceGrantStore`（v1beta1→v1），EndpointSlice 是唯一不持久化的类型。changed predicate 把「资源变了」收窄为「与配置相关的资源变了」，分三类：`nil`（主体资源始终算）、`funcPredicate{isReferenced}`（被引用才算）、`funcPredicate{isNGFPolicyRelevant}`（策略相关才算）、`annotationChangedPredicate`（如 CRD 的 `bundle-version`）。关键概念还包括：`ForceRebuild` 旁路（不动 store 只置真，供 WAF bundle 场景）、predicate 依赖 `latestGraph` 的首图悖论、未注册类型即 panic 的 fail-fast 守门。本讲止于 `Process` 输出的 `graph.Graph`，供 u5-l1 建图与 u5-l3 端点解析承接。
### u5-l1 Graph：把 Gateway API 资源变成内部模型

本讲讲解 `Graph` 的构建：把 ChangeProcessor 输出的 `ClusterState`（集群资源快照原料）经唯一入口 `BuildGraph` 加工成内部模型 `Graph`，按依赖拓扑顺序装配，策略类资源必须最后处理。核心结论有三：其一，GatewayClass 经 `processGatewayClasses` 分为 Winner（名字与 controllerName 均匹配，被认领）、Ignored（指向 NGF 但名字不匹配，需回写「不支持」状态）、跳过三类；其二，Gateway 经 `processGateways` 按 `gatewayClassName` 过滤，无效的 Gateway 也进图但仅保留精简结构、不带 Listeners，以保证错误状态可回写；其三，校验采用「分层+早退+渐进兼容」策略——错误不靠 error 抛出，而是沉淀进每个节点的 `Conditions` 字段并由 `Valid` 布尔位决定能否参与配置生成。关键术语包括：节点三元组范式（`Source`+`Valid`+`Conditions`）、数据面无关/相关校验、`EffectiveNginxProxy`（GC 级与 GW 级合并）、`(Type,Status,Reason,Message)` 四元组条件。本讲止于 GatewayClass/Gateway 节点，路由、监听器、后端解析、最终配置表示由后续讲义承接。
### u5-l2 路由与监听器：HTTP/gRPC/TCP/TLS/UDP

本讲承接 Graph 构建，下钻 NGF 如何把 Gateway API 的 Route 识别并绑定到 Listener。核心是归一化：HTTPRoute/GRPCRoute 收敛为 L7Route，TLSRoute/TCPRoute/UDPRoute 收敛为 L4Route，由 RouteType 区分；公共构建骨架在 route_common.go，经解析 parentRefs、校验 hostnames/rules、解析 backendRefs、打标 Valid/Attachable 五步完成，枢纽函数为 buildSectionNameRefs（处理 sectionName 缺省时展开到全部 Listener）。Listener 由 listenerConfiguratorFactory 按协议分发校验器，跑 validators、conflictResolvers、externalResolvers 三段，并分离 Valid 与 Attachable；协议到 Route 类型的权威映射见 getValidKindsForProtocol。绑定走 sectionName/port、协议、主机名三重匹配，结果沉淀为 Accepted Condition；TCP/UDP 因无判别条件而一端口一路由，绑定后还做监听器主机名隔离。ListenerSet（GEP-1713）支持监听器跨资源/命名空间复用，需父 Gateway 的 AllowedListeners 授权并复用其 ListenerFactory 以保证冲突检测一致，Route 以 parentRef.kind: ListenerSet 挂载。本讲只把 backendRefs 放入 RouteRule，真正的 Service/Endpoints 解析与 ReferenceGrant 授权留给后续讲义。
### u5-l3 后端解析：Service、BackendRef、ReferenceGrant

本讲解析 NGF 后端解析的两阶段设计。图阶段由 `createBackendRef` 把 `RouteBackendRef` 加工成内部 `BackendRef`，依次完成 weight 计算、group/kind 校验、查 Service 取 `ServicePort`（`getPortFromRef`）、ReferenceGrant 授权、关联 BackendTLSPolicy 与 appProtocol 兼容校验；即使引用非法也生成 `Valid=false` 的 BackendRef，由数据面返回 500，错误一律沉淀为 `ResolvedRefs=False` 配不同 Reason（BackendNotFound、RefNotPermitted、InvalidKind、UnsupportedValue、UnsupportedProtocol）。配置阶段由 `ServiceResolver` 借 EndpointSlice 字段索引 `k8sServiceName` 将 `Service+ServicePort` 解析为就绪、去重后的 `[]Endpoint`，使高频 Pod 变动不触发图重建。关键术语：内部 `BackendRef`、`ServicePort`、`Endpoint`、`ReferenceGrant`（图构建时笛卡尔积拍平为 `allowedReference` 集合，按精确名与通配命名空间两档 O(1) 查询授权，且必须放在目标命名空间）。该授权机制还被 Gateway→Secret/ConfigMap（TLS）与 WAF 场景复用。
### u5-l4 dataplane.Configuration：图的最终配置表示

本讲是「图构建与数据面配置」单元（u5）收官篇，讲解 `dataplane.Configuration` 这层「渲染模型」：它把领域模型 `graph.Graph` 翻译成面向 NGINX 配置块（而非 K8s 资源类型）切分的中间表示，使生成器与 Gateway API 彻底解耦、可单测。

核心入口 `BuildConfiguration(g *graph.Graph, gateway, plus) Configuration` 采用「早退 → 一组并行 `build*` → 一次性字面量装配」结构：无效 Gateway 返回 `GetDefaultConfiguration` 最小骨架而非空配置；多个 `build*` 函数彼此独立产出不同字段，依赖通过显式传参传递。证书严格分两类：`SSLKeyPairs`（含私钥，前端 TLS 终止用）与 `CertBundles`（仅 CA，验证对端用，用于后端 mTLS/外部鉴权/JWT/OIDC），各有独立 ID 体系，用 map 天然去重、按「需求驱动」过滤落盘。L4（TCP/UDP/TLS）服务落在 `stream` 上下文，由 `buildTLSServers`/`buildL4Servers` 产出 `Layer4VirtualServer`，TLSRoute 区分 Passthrough 与 Terminate。所有会变成配置文本的切片构建后都排序，保证「相同输入→相同输出」以避免无谓 reload。关键术语：`SSLKeyPairID`/`CertBundleID`（可作文件名）、`DeploymentContext`（由 handler 注入而非内部填）、`Layer4VirtualServer`、`SSLListenerHostnames`（misdirected request 检测）。下游交给 `generator.Generate(conf)` 渲染（u6）。
### u6-l1 配置生成器总览：从 Configuration 到 []File

本讲讲解配置生成器：控制面里把领域无关的渲染模型 `dataplane.Configuration` 翻译成一组 NGINX 文件的唯一组件。核心抽象是 `Generator` 接口（仅用于测试，生产用无状态的 `GeneratorImpl`，持 `plus`/`usageReportConfig`/`logger` 三字段），其主方法 `Generate` 按三段式产出 `[]agent.File`：先写密钥类文件（PEM/bundle/auth，绕过模板链直接 append，权限更严），再走模板执行链，最后写 bundle/cert/auth。

模板执行链是核心机制：12 个 `executeFunc` 各吃整份配置、吐 `[]executeResult{dest, data}`，由 `executeConfigTemplates` 用 `map[string][]byte` **按 dest 分桶合并**——servers/upstreams/maps/split_clients/base_http/telemetry 六个函数都写同一份 `http.conf`，stream 侧同理拼成 `stream.conf`，便于 Agent 做 hash 比对与增量下发。关键术语：`executeResult`、`executeFunc`、分桶合并、复合策略生成器。

目录与 NGINX 上下文严格对应：`main-includes`→main、`events-includes`→events、`conf.d`→http、`stream-conf.d`→stream，被静态 `nginx.conf` 的四条 `include` 通配符拉入对应上下文；而 `secrets`/`includes`/`bundles` 是「数据目录」，不被 include、靠具体指令按绝对路径引用，includes.go 负责按文件名去重。本讲只讲总装与目录组织，server/upstream 块内部指令细节留给 u6-l2、u6-l3、u6-l4，产物下发交给 u7-l1 的 NginxUpdater。
### u6-l2 nginx.conf 骨架与模板体系

本讲回答「生成的配置如何被 NGINX 加载」这一衔接问题，核心结论是：NGF 的 `nginx.conf` 是一份随镜像内置、永不改写的**静态骨架**，仅定义 main/events/http/stream 四大上下文，并用四条 `include` 通配（main-includes、events-includes、conf.d、stream-conf.d）把可变内容外包给生成器；`load_module` 必须排在最前，决定了 main 的 include 位置。引入的关键术语包括：NGINX 上下文层级、include 文本展开、按 dest 分桶合并。三套骨架模板各管一个上下文地基——main（按需 `load_module`、`error_log`）、events（仅 `worker_connections`）、base http（http2、resolver、map、健康检查 server、日志、OIDC）。模板用 Go `text/template` 在包加载时 `Parse` 成全局变量，经 `MustExecuteTemplate` 渲染。include 机制将 snippet/policy/authz 转为独立 `.conf` 文件、以 `Name` 为键先到先得去重，骨架只渲染 `include <Name>;` 引用行；`includes/` 是数据目录，靠绝对路径引用、不在通配 include 内。业务 server/upstream 留给 u6-l3，stream 留给 u6-l4。
### u6-l3 Servers、Upstreams 与 Locations 生成

本讲覆盖 NGF 把 `dataplane.Configuration` 翻译成 NGINX `server`/`location`/`upstream` 指令的三个最小模块。其一，server 块（`servers.go`）：将 `HTTPServers`/`SSLServers` 翻译为 `http.Server`，区分业务 server、HTTP default（`return 404`）、SSL default（`ssl_reject_handshake`），并静态写死 503/500 两个兜底 socket。其二，upstream（`upstreams.go`）：逐个决定 zone（OSS 512k / Plus 1m，可被 `UpstreamSettingsPolicy` 覆盖）、LB 方法（默认 `random two least_conn` 而非 round-robin）、keepalive（默认 16，0 则关闭）、state 文件（仅 Plus）；无端点或无效引用时退化为 503/500。其三，location（`createLocations`）：按是否带 HTTP 匹配条件或推理后端分三路——直接 proxy、NJS 内部 location、EPP 推理 location；无尾斜杠 Prefix 拆成双 location 并做去重。多后端加权用 `split_clients`，`percentOf` 向下取整保总和 ≤100，proxy_pass 退化为 `$变量`。关键耦合点 `keepAliveChecker` 使 location 的 Connection 头取值取决于后端 upstream 是否开启 keepalive。所有 server/upstream 模板产物按 dest 分桶合并进同一份 `http.conf`。
### u6-l4 Stream 配置：TCP/UDP/TLS Passthrough

本讲承接 HTTP 上下文配置生成，转向 NGINX 的 stream 上下文，讲清 NGF 如何把 Gateway API 的 TCPRoute/UDPRoute/TLSRoute（L4 路由）翻译成 `stream.conf`。三个最小模块：①stream 上下文定位——L4 配置统一落在 `streamConfigFile`，由静态 `nginx.conf` 的 `stream {}` 经 `include` 拉入，与 http 上下文指令集互不重叠，靠 dest 常量分桶隔离；②TCP/UDP 服务器生成——一条路由产出 `stream server { listen <port>[ udp]; proxy_pass <upstream>; }` 与 `stream upstream { random two least_conn; }`，`(port,protocol)` 用 portProtoKey 去重，多后端加权时 proxy_pass 退化为 `$backend_<port>` 并配 `split_clients`；③TLS Passthrough/Terminate——每个 TLS 端口配一个「只看不摸」的端口级 server（`ssl_preread on` 偷看 SNI 填入 `$ssl_preread_server_name`，再 `pass $dest<port>`）加一张 `主机名→socket` 路由 map，每主机名对应一个 socket server：Passthrough 直接转发加密流，Terminate 先 `ssl_certificate` 终止再代理。关键契约：`getTLSPassthroughVarName`、`getSocketNameTLS`/`-terminate`、map 的 `hostnames;`。生成器注册 `executeStreamServers/Upstreams/Maps` 三个执行函数，输出仍为 `[]agent.File`。
### u7-l1 NginxUpdater 与 gRPC Agent 通信

本讲解答「配置如何从控制面送达数据面」，含三个最小模块。其一，`NginxUpdater` 是下发总入口：`UpdateConfig` 只做「算版本、广播元数据、记错误」三步，`configVersion` 未变即早退，实现配置生成与网络通信的解耦。其二，控制面作 gRPC 服务端，注册 `CommandService`（推送主信道）与 `FileService`（反向拉文件），经 mTLS 与 TokenReview 双重校验；`ConnectionsTracker` 用 UUID 追踪每条连接，Agent 上报 InstanceID 后连接才 Ready。其三，`DeploymentBroadcaster` 以「一对多 + 同步确认」扇出消息，`Messenger` 把双向流解耦为发/收两个 channel，`Subscribe` 主循环用 select 统一调度。核心机制是「推文件清单、Agent 反向 `GetFile` 拉内容」的混合模式；整条链路靠 `FileLock` 串成原子事务，保证下发期间文件视图一致。引入的关键术语包括 `NginxUpdater`、MPI 协议、`DeploymentBroadcaster`、`Messenger`、`ConnectionsTracker`、`FileLock` 等。
### u7-l2 配置文件下发与 Deployment 管理

本讲承接 u7-l1，讲清控制面把 NGINX 配置「文件化」后如何按数据面 Deployment 组织、并把同一份配置一致下发给每个副本。围绕 `internal/controller/nginx/agent/` 下三个最小模块展开：`Deployment`/`DeploymentStore`、`FileService`、`CommandService`，辅以 `DeploymentBroadcaster` 与 `ConnectionsTracker`。

引入的关键术语：`Deployment`（控制面内部按工作负载名索引的「配置 + 广播器 + 每 Pod 错误」聚合体，非 Kubernetes 对象）、`configVersion`（对全量文件元数据算出的内容驱动版本号）、`FileOverview`/`File`、`ConfigApplyRequest`、`unmanaged` 文件标记。

核心结论：① 配置按 Deployment 组织而非按 Pod，多副本共享单一权威文件集，多副本一致性被收敛为单一数据源问题；② 采用「推清单（只含元数据 + configVersion）+ Agent 反向拉内容（`GetFile`/`GetFileStream`）」的混合传输，hash 命中跳过、大文件按 2 MiB 分块；③ 内容不变时 `configVersion` 相同、`rebuildFileOverviews` 返回 `nil`，实现零广播零 reload；④ `CommandService` 只管连接生命周期（`CreateConnection → UpdateDataPlaneStatus → Subscribe`），reload 是 Agent 处理 `ConfigApplyRequest` 的副作用，控制面不下发 reload 命令；⑤ 多 Pod 一致性三件套：单一 Deployment 对象、`Broadcaster.Send` 的「等待全部响应」同步屏障、handler 贯穿整条事务的 `FileLock`，新 Pod 的「订阅 + 初始配置」同锁以防漏更新。每 Pod 错误经聚合后入 statusQueue 并置 `NginxConfigPushed: true`，衔接后续状态回写讲义。
### u8-l1 Conditions 体系与状态更新

本讲拆解 NGF 状态上报链路，含三模块。Conditions 体系：状态结论是 Type/Status/Reason/Message 四元组；conditions.go 为唯一词典，NewXxx() 工厂造句，DeduplicateConditions 按 Type 后写者覆盖去重，ConvertConditions 补 ObservedGeneration/LastTransitionTime 转 metav1.Condition，惯用法为默认条件先放、具体条件后放。状态队列与 GroupUpdater：status.Queue 以多生产者 Enqueue、单消费者 Dequeue 把慢写盘与事件循环解耦；Updater 用乐观锁读最新 → Setter 幂等改 → Status().Update 配指数退避重试，Setter 保留其他控制器写的 status 且比较时忽略 LastTransitionTime；请求按 groupGateways/groupAllExceptGateways/groupControlPlane 分组、同组后写整体覆盖，Gateway 单独一组以便公网 IP 变化时只刷新它。leader 感知写入：LeaderAwareGroupUpdater 为两阶段状态机，未 Enable 时按组暂存请求不落盘，当选时 Enable（仅一次）回放暂存并切换直通，由 CallFunctionsAfterBecameLeader 与 provisioner.Enable、eventHandler.enable 一并翻开，实现非 leader 热备、leader 单写。
### u8-l2 自定义 CRD 与策略附着（Policy Attachment）

本讲解析 NGF 自定义 CRD 与 Gateway API 策略附着机制。CRD 分两类：**配置类资源**（`NginxProxy`/`NginxGateway`，经 `parametersRef` 引用，无 `targetRef` 与 `PolicyStatus`，配置数据面/控制面本身）与**策略类资源**（ClientSettingsPolicy、SnippetsPolicy、WAFPolicy、ObservabilityPolicy 等，经 `targetRef(s)` 附着到流量对象），二者共享 `policies.Policy` 接口，故图层能用同一套代码处理。策略附着遵循 GEP-713，分 **Direct**（仅作用于直接目标，不继承）与 **Inherited**（挂 Gateway 时向下继承到 Route）两种语义，由 kubebuilder 标签 `policy=direct|inherited` 标注，与 `targetRef`/`targetRefs` 单复数正交。图层中策略处理是 `BuildGraph` 的最后一步：`processPolicies` 解析 → `markConflictedPolicies` 按优先级裁决冲突 → `attachPolicies` 按 Kind 分发到 Gateway/Route/Service（经 `ValidateGlobalSettings` 校验对 NginxProxy 全局配置的依赖）→ 回写 `*PolicyAffected` 条件。NginxProxy 经 `processNginxProxies` 校验后，由 `buildEffectiveNginxProxy` 用 JSON marshal/unmarshal 合并 GatewayClass 级与 Gateway 级两份（Gateway 覆盖前者），再以 `cleanupEffectiveNginxProxy` 修补切片清空与字段互斥，产出每个 Gateway 的 `EffectiveNginxProxy`。全程沿用 Source+Valid+Conditions 节点三元组范式，策略另以 `InvalidForGateways` 表达多 Gateway 下的细粒度有效性。
### u8-l3 策略到 NGINX 指令的生成

本讲承接 u8-l2 的策略附着，回答「已校验附着的 `Policy` 对象如何变成 NGINX 配置文本」。核心是组合模式三件套：`Generator` 接口（五个方法 `GenerateFor{Main|HTTP|Server|Location|InternalLocation}` 对应五个 NGINX 上下文）、`CompositeGenerator`（仅做转发与拼接，自身不生成指令）、`UnimplementedGenerator`（嵌入后让生成器只重写关心的上下文）。产物为 `[]policies.File`，经 `createIncludesFromPolicyGenerateResult` 转成 `Include` 挂到对应上下文。字段→指令有三种范式：直接用 Spec（clientsettings）、经中间结构 `getXxxSettings` 适配（proxysettings 的布尔/拼接、ratelimit 的 zone 命名与默认值）、按 location 类型分发模板（observability）。ratelimit 最复杂：一个策略横跨 http（`limit_req_zone`）与 server/location（`limit_req`）两上下文，靠「影子策略 + 注解」解决 Route 级跨上下文 zone 声明。关键区分：指令型策略走 Generator，属性型策略（UpstreamSettingsPolicy）走 Processor 改 upstream 渲染参数。校验侧对称：`Validator` + `CompositeValidator`（按 GVK 路由）+ `NewManager` 注册，提供 `Validate`/`ValidateGlobalSettings`/`Conflicts`，防注入正则与 genericValidator 是生成前的安全闸门，`Conflicts` 字段级判定服务继承裁决，未注册校验器即 panic（fail-fast）。
### u9-l1 Provisioner：为每个 Gateway 创建/回收 NGINX 资源

本讲介绍 NGF 控制面中与主配置链路平行的 **Provisioner（资源置备器）** 子系统：主循环负责「数据面 NGINX 的配置内容」，Provisioner 负责「数据面工作负载本身的生老病死」，二者仅通过 `Provisioner` 接口的唯一方法 `RegisterGateway` 异步衔接。`NginxProvisioner` 是其实现，所有写集群方法首行均受 `isLeader()` 门控，非 leader 只记账（`resourcesToDeleteOnStartup`），当选后由 `Enable` 补删。Provisioner 自带一条挂在 `LeaderOrNonLeader` 上的独立事件循环，watch Gateway 及其创建的全部数据面资源，以 NGF 标签谓词认领自家资源，首批事件中 `GatewayList` 必须首位以建立归属地图。`store`（`NginxResources` 台账）只存 ObjectMeta，用 `gatewayChanged`（比较 Valid/Source/EffectiveNginxProxy/Listeners 四维、监听器忽略顺序）避免无谓重建，并以 resourceVersion 短路防回流死循环。生命周期由 `buildNginxResourceObjects`（按 secrets→configmaps→SA→Service→workload→HPA→PDB 顺序产出，全以 Gateway 为 owner）驱动 `provisionNginx` 建/更新，agent ConfigMap 变更时打 `restartedAt` 注解滚动重启；无效 Gateway 走 `deprovisionNginxForInvalidGateway`，误删走 `reprovisionNginx`。最简 OSS 场景下一个有效 Gateway 至少创建 6 个对象：agent TLS Secret、2 个 ConfigMap、ServiceAccount、Service、Deployment；回收则叠加 owner-reference GC 与主动 deprovision 双重机制，并联动清空 `DeploymentStore`。
### u10-l1 WAFPolicy 与 Bundle 模型

本讲是 WAF（F5 NGINX App Protect）集成单元第一讲，聚焦数据模型与 bundle 来源选择，不涉及运行时拉取链路。核心 CRD 是 WAFPolicy，一个 Inherited Attached Policy（继承型附着策略），通过 targetRefs 附着到 Gateway/HTTPRoute/GRPCRoute 并向下继承；它只负责"指路"——用 type 声明来源、用 securityLogs 配日志，规则细节在编译后的 bundle（.tgz，对应 NAP v5）里而不在 CRD 内。

关键术语：spec.type 是四值枚举。四种来源分两类——直接拉 URL（HTTP/NIM/N1C，用 policySource + 同命名空间 Secret 鉴权）与引用 CRD（PLM，用 policyRef.apPolicyRef + 集群级 --plm-storage-* S3 配置）。鉴权头各异：HTTP 用 Basic、NIM 用 Bearer、N1C 用 APIToken、PLM 用 S3 access/secret key。字段间的互斥配对由 CEL 写入 kubebuilder 注解，由 API server 准入层拒绝。

PLM 模式下，APPolicy/APLogConf（appprotect.f5.com 组，由 PLM 组件管理）的 status 经 apis/waf/v1 轻量类型反序列化为 BundleStatus，其 State 为 pending→processing→ready/invalid 状态机，仅 ready 带 S3 location 与 sha256。bundle 完整性靠统一 SHA-256 校验：HTTP 用 expectedChecksum 或 verifyChecksum，NIM/N1C 用平台 API 返回的 hash 自动校验，PLM 用 APPolicy status 的 sha256。失败行为映射到 Conditions：拉取失败→FetchError、校验失败→IntegrityError、未就绪→Pending（fail-closed，withhold 配置下发）、旧 bundle 兜底→StaleBundleWarning、PLM 未配置→Accepted/Invalid。
### u10-l2 Bundle 拉取、轮询与下发

本讲讲清 bundle 从远端到数据面的运行时链路，覆盖四个最小模块：`HTTPFetcher`（`fetch.Fetcher`）把 HTTP/NIM/N1C 三种来源收敛为统一的「拉取+校验+重试+条件请求」；`s3.Fetcher` 专供 PLM 的 SeaweedFS；`poller` 每个 WAFPolicy 一个，周期轮询、判变、推数据面；`pollerManager` 管 poller 生命周期并桥接事件循环。核心结论是两条独立路径——HTTP/NIM/N1C 由 poller 异步轮询，PLM 由 CRD 事件驱动、在图构建时同步拉取、不进 poller。判变优先于下载：HTTP 用条件请求（`If-None-Match`/`If-Modified-Since`→304）省正文，NIM/N1C 用「只取 checksum」的元数据接口（`SupportsChecksumOnlyFetch`）。checksum 是判变唯一裁判，未变则连广播都不发，实现高频轮询、低频下发。重试只对 transient（5xx/网络错）退避，4xx 与校验失败包成 `nonTransientError` 立即失败。最关键机制：bundle 首次可用时 manager 注入 `WAFBundleReconcileEvent`，触发 `ForceRebuild` 清除 `BundlePending`、放开 fail-closed；后续变化只推文件、不重建主配置。bundle 推送与主配置下发共用 `FileLock` 保证文件视图一致。
### u11-l1 Prometheus 指标

本讲讲解 NGF 控制面如何采集与暴露 Prometheus 指标，核心模块有三。其一，指标注册：控制面复用 controller-runtime 的全局 `metrics.Registry`，在装配期由 `createMetricsCollector` 用 `MustRegister` 把自定义 `ControllerCollector` 注册进去；关闭指标时改注入 no-op 占位对象以避免 nil 指针，handler 代码零改动。其二，`ControllerCollector` 是控制面唯一自定义 Collector，仅采集一个直方图指标 `event_batch_processing_milliseconds`（命名空间 `nginx_gateway_fabric`，桶 `[500,1000,5000,10000,30000]` ms，常量标签 `class`），在 `HandleEventBatch` 的 `defer` 中每批观测一次，可经 `histogram_quantile` 或超阈值批次占比写处理过慢告警。其三，metrics 端口有两条独立链路：控制面走 flag `--metrics-port`（`config.MetricsConfig` 经 `getMetricsOptions` 翻译为 metrics server 监听地址），数据面 NGINX 走 CRD `NginxProxy.Metrics`（`MetricsEnabledForNginxProxy` 解析）；二者默认均为 9113（`DefaultNginxMetricsPort`），且该端口被图层 `buildProtectedPorts` 列为受保护端口，禁止 Gateway Listener 占用。关键术语：Registry、Collector、`MustRegister`、no-op 占位、`event_batch_processing_milliseconds`、`MetricsConfig`、`NginxProxy.Metrics`、受保护端口。
### u11-l2 产品遥测（Telemetry）

本讲剖析 NGF 的「产品遥测」——与上一讲面向运维、高频本地暴露的 Prometheus 指标不同，它是低频（默认 24 小时一次）、主动外发、向项目方汇总集群画像的产品反馈。讲解围绕三块拼图组织：数据模型、数据采集、周期上报。

数据模型以 `data.avdl`（Avro IDL）为唯一契约，所有业务字段均设为 nullable 以保证 schema 演进的前后向兼容；Go 侧 `Data` 结构与 OTLP 属性映射 `Attributes()` 由 `go:generate` 从契约同步产出，三者不可手工拆离。`Data` 含公共元数据、产品/构建信息、集群画像、脱敏 flag、`NGFResourceCounts` 资源与策略计数、snippets 指令统计等。

采集由 `DataCollector` 完成，只读复用 `GetLatestGraph`/`GetLatestConfiguration` 及 API server 快照，任一步失败则整条丢弃。关键隐私点：`parseFlags` 对非布尔 flag 仅上报 `default`/`user-defined`，绝不外泄真实值。

周期上报以 `Leader` 套 `CronJob` 实现——仅 leader、首图就绪后启动、带 10 分钟抖动、失败只打日志不阻塞主链路。

核心结论：运行时唯一能关闭产品遥测的开关是 `--product-telemetry-disable`（默认开启，总闸）；上报周期、端点、TLS 均为构建期 ldflags `-X` 注入，非运行时可调；字段层面无逐项开关。后续讲义将承接契约驱动、Leader/CronJob 模式及脱敏 flag 等概念。
### u11-l3 OpenTelemetry 链路追踪

本讲讲解 NGF 如何为 HTTP/gRPC 路由开启 OpenTelemetry 分布式链路追踪，核心是**两层职责分离**：集群运维在 `NginxProxy.Telemetry` 配置全局 OTLP exporter（决定 trace 发往哪），应用开发者用 Direct 附着策略 `ObservabilityPolicy` 控制每路由的采样与属性；`ValidateGlobalSettings` 强制全局 endpoint 必须就绪，否则策略 NotAccepted。关键术语：`Tracing` 字段（`Strategy` ratio/parent、`Ratio`、`Context` extract/inject/propagate/ignore、`SpanName`、`SpanAttributes`）、渲染模型 `dataplane.Telemetry`、`ngx_otel_module` 指令。渲染分两套模板：全局 `executeTelemetry` 产出 `otel_exporter`/`otel_service_name`/`split_clients`（落 http.conf），每路由 observability 生成器（u8-l3 框架的具体实现，重写 `GenerateForLocation`/`GenerateForInternalLocation`）产出 `otel_trace`/`otel_trace_context`/`otel_span_*`（挂 location）。结论：ratio 采样用 `split_clients` 一致性哈希（同 ratio 去重共享），parent 用 `$otel_parent_sampled`，由 `getStrategy` 决定 `otel_trace` 取值；span 属性按「策略+全局」合并，服务名默认 `ngf:<ns>:<gw>`；当路由需内部 location 时，采样开关置外部、span 属性置内部，分两处渲染。
### u12-l1 Gateway API 推理扩展（Inference）

本讲围绕 NGF 对接 Gateway API Inference Extension 展开三个最小模块：**endpoint-picker shim**（`endpoint-picker` 子命令）是数据面 Pod 内的 HTTP↔gRPC ext_proc 翻译器，因 NGINX 不会发起 ext_proc，由它对外监听 `127.0.0.1:54800`、对内将 HTTP 请求翻译成 ext_proc 流打给 **EPP**，是无状态协议翻译器。**InferencePool 图处理**把该 CRD 当作一类后端：`buildReferencedInferencePools` 反向收集被 Route 引用的池，跑 Accepted/ResolvedRefs 校验，结果沉淀到 `Graph.ReferencedInferencePools` 并双向回写状态；因其属 `x-k8s.io` 非标准 API 组，控制器不走标准 CRD 发现，由 `--gateway-api-inference-extension` flag 单独开关。**NGINX↔EPP 头交互**全链路靠约定头/变量缝合：NJS 用 `X-EPP-Host/Port` 打 shim、收 `X-Gateway-Destination-Endpoint` 写入 `$inference_workload_endpoint`，再经 `map` 解析为 `$inference_backend_<pool>` 供 `proxy_pass` 使用，同时编码 FailOpen/FailClose 兜底。shim 由 provisioner 作为 sidecar 注入，仅推理 Gateway 才有。
### u12-l2 NGINX Plus 能力：动态上游、授权与用量上报

本讲义讲解 NGF 在 NGINX Plus 模式下的三项独有能力。第一是**动态上游（dynamic upstream）**：`UpdateUpstreamServers` 通过 NGINX Plus 运行时 API 原地改写 upstream 共享内存 zone，把后端地址变动从「改配置 + reload」收敛为一次 API 调用，从而跳过 reload；`actionsEqual` 在后端集合未变时直接早退，连 API 调用都省略。其依赖 upstream 的 zone 共享内存与 state file 持久化，且带 resolve 的不可变上游需跳过。第二是 Plus 管理面两段专属配置：`plus-api.conf`（可写 unix socket 供 Agent 改上游 + 只读 8765 dashboard）与 `mgmt` 块（授权令牌、用量上报、TLS），均由 `AllowedAddresses` 或 `g.plus` 开关控制，OSS 不生成。第三是**授权闭环**：`deployment_ctx.json`（标识安装/集群，由 collector 采集、handler 注入、生成器落盘，含 init 容器与 handler 两条互补路径）配合 mgmt 的 `usage_report`/`license_token` 完成计费与鉴权。广播层用 `ConfigApplyRequest`（写文件+reload）与 `APIRequest`（调 Plus API）区分两条下发路径。
### u12-l3 TLS 安全：前端证书、后端 TLS 与 Agent mTLS

本讲讲透 NGF 数据链路上三段相互独立的 TLS 通道：前端 TLS、后端 TLS、Agent mTLS，核心主线是「证书材料二分法」——出示身份用含私钥的 `SSLKeyPair`（落盘 `.pem`），验证对端用仅 CA 的 `CertBundle`（落盘 `.crt`）。前端 TLS 由 Gateway Listener 的 `tls.certificateRefs` 经图阶段解析为 `Listener.ResolvedSecrets`，渲染成 `SSLKeyPair` 并以 `KeyPairIDs` 实现 SNI；附加的前端 mTLS 由 `gateway.spec.tls.frontend` 驱动，`AllowValidOnly` 映射 `ssl_verify_client on`，`AllowInsecureFallback` 映射 `optional_no_ca` 并告警。后端 TLS 由标准 CRD BackendTLSPolicy 驱动，`caCertificateRefs` 与 `wellKnownCACertificates: System` 互斥，前者经 `convertBackendTLS` 产出 `CertBundleID` 下发 `.crt`，后者用常量 `AlpineSSLRootCAPath`（`/etc/ssl/cert.pem`），最终生成 `proxy_ssl_verify`/`proxy_ssl_name`/`proxy_ssl_trusted_certificate` 指令。Agent mTLS 由 `generate-certs` 自签 CA，签出服务端（SAN `<svc>.<ns>.svc`）与客户端（SAN `*.<clusterDomain>`）证书写入共享 `ca.crt` 的 `server-tls`/`agent-tls`，控制面以 `RequireAndVerifyClientCert`+TLS 1.3 强制双向校验，靠 `GetConfigForClient` 每连接重读磁盘实现免重启轮换，并叠加 TokenReview 作为第二道闸门收敛身份。关键术语：`SSLKeyPair`/`CertBundle` 及其 ID 体系、`VerifyTLS`、`ResolvedSecrets`、前端校验两模式、BackendTLSPolicy 的互斥 CA 来源与 ancestor 受限的 `Gateways` 列表。
### u12-l4 SnippetsFilter 与认证过滤器

本讲讲解 NGF 的两条 ExtensionRef 扩展机制：SnippetsFilter 与 AuthenticationFilter。SnippetsFilter 是把原始 NGINX 指令注入生成配置的「逃逸舱」，仅允许 main/http/http.server/http.server.location 四个上下文、每上下文唯一；main/http 在 Gateway 级全局聚合，server/location 跟随路由规则，最终经 include 按文件名去重落盘，受 SnippetsFilters/Snippets 特性开关门控、默认关闭。AuthenticationFilter 用 spec.type（Basic/JWT/OIDC）三选一，CEL 强制类型与字段互斥：Basic 走 OSS 自带 auth_basic，JWT/OIDC 依赖 NGINX Plus 并在图层判 isPlus。关键术语：ExtensionRefFilter（图层对扩展过滤器的联合包装结构）、Snippet 上下文（NGINX 配置层级）、AuthType 枚举、claim 名脱敏冲突（sanitizeClaimNameForVariable）、Referenced 标记。核心结论：两类过滤器均经 validateExtensionRefFilter 做 Group/Kind 白名单与同 namespace 解析，无效时置 Valid=false 并沉淀进 Conditions；OIDC 因共享 NGINX 路径空间，须在绑定后做 HTTPS 监听器与 URI 冲突校验。整体沿用 Source/Valid/Conditions 三元组 → dataplane 渲染模型 → servers.go 挂指令的统一骨架。

---

## 本讲义规格

- id: u13-l1
- 文件名: u13-l1-testing-approach.md
- 写入路径: nginx-gateway-fabric-tutorial/u13-l1-testing-approach.md
- 标题: 测试体系：单元、Fake 与集成测试
- 学习阶段: advanced
- 主题: 讲解 NGF 的测试方法：counterfeiter 生成的 fake、envtest 集成测试、conformance 测试的组织。
- 学习目标: 掌握 controllerfakes/statefakes 等 fake 的生成与使用；理解 controller_suite_test 的 envtest 集成测试；了解 Gateway API conformance 测试入口
- 应覆盖的最小模块: fake 生成，envtest 集成测试，conformance 测试
- 关键源码: internal/controller/controller_suite_test.go，docs/developer/testing.md，tests/README.md
- 代码实践任务: 为一个新函数编写单元测试，并使用现有 fake 替换依赖。
- 依赖讲义: u1-l3

---

## 任务

完成后，用一句话总结本讲义覆盖的最小模块。

Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.

- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.

- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.

content.content:
1	# Testing
2	
3	This document provides guidelines for testing, including instructions on running the unit tests, accessing the code
4	coverage report, performing manual testing, and running the conformance tests. By following these guidelines, you will
5	gain a thorough understanding of the project's approach to unit testing, enabling you to ensure code quality, validate
6	functionality, and maintain robust test coverage.
7	
8	## Unit Test Guidelines
9	
10	In our testing approach, we employ a combination of Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) style tests and traditional unit
11	tests. The choice of testing style depends on the nature of the code being tested. Here's a breakdown of our testing
12	practices:
13	
14	**All exported interfaces must be covered by BDD style tests**: We use the [Ginkgo](https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/)
15	testing framework, which enables us to write expressive and readable tests that focus on the behavior of our code.
16	Additionally, we use the [Gomega](https://onsi.github.io/gomega/) matcher library to provide powerful assertions and
17	expectations within our BDD style tests.
18	
19	**Most testing should be done at the exported interface layer**: By writing tests at the exported interface layer, we
20	ensure that the tests remain decoupled from the internal implementation details. This allows us to refactor and modify
21	the implementation of the interface without needing to extensively update the tests. It promotes flexibility and
22	maintainability in our codebase.
23	
24	**Use standard unit tests to cover gaps**:  While we primarily focus on testing at the exported interface layer, we
25	acknowledge the importance of comprehensive test coverage. If we identify areas that require additional testing or if
26	the exported interface layer doesn't provide sufficient coverage, we typically use unit tests to cover these gaps. This
27	ensures that critical code paths and edge cases are thoroughly tested. We still use
28	the [Gomega](https://onsi.github.io/gomega/) matcher library for assertions within these tests.
29	
30	**Use table-driven tests**: When testing multiple cases for a single function or method, we prefer to use table-driven
31	tests. For BDD style tests, use [DescribeTable](https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/#table-specs) and for standard unit tests,
32	use [subtests](https://go.dev/blog/subtests).
33	
34	**Generate test mocks**: To facilitate the generation of mocks for testing, we use
35	the [Counterfeiter](https://github.com/maxbrunsfeld/counterfeiter) tool. Counterfeiter helps us create mock
36	implementations of internal and public interfaces, allowing us to isolate and control dependencies during testing. It
37	simplifies the process of mocking and stubbing, making our tests more robust and flexible.
38	
39	**Parallelize unit tests**: In general, all tests should be designed to run in parallel for faster execution and help uncover bugs. For standard Go tests, this requires adding `t.Parallel()` to every test and subtest. Ginkgo tests, on the other hand, automatically run in parallel without the need for additional configuration. If a component under test requires sequential execution, you can run tests sequentially by using an [ordered container](https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/#ordered-containers) for Ginkgo tests or by omitting `t.Parallel()` from the go test or subtest. In such cases, it’s essential to include a comment explaining why parallel execution is not possible.
40	
41	By combining BDD style tests, unit tests, and mock generation, we aim to achieve a comprehensive and maintainable
42	testing strategy. This approach enables us to ensure the correctness, reliability, and flexibility of our codebase while
43	promoting efficient refactoring and continuous development.
44	
45	### Running the Unit Tests
46	
47	To run the unit tests, run the make unit-test command from the project's root directory:
48	
49	```makefile
50	make unit-test
51	```
52	
53	This command runs the unit tests with the `-race` flag, enabling the detection of potential data races.
54	
55	#### Viewing Code Coverage Report
56	
57	The unit tests generate a code coverage file named `cover.html` in the project's root directory. To view the code
58	coverage report, open the `cover.html` file in your browser. The report provides insights into which parts of the code
59	are covered by the tests and helps identify areas that may require additional testing.
60	
61	## Manual Testing
62	
63	To ensure the quality and correctness of your changes, it is essential to perform manual testing in a Kubernetes
64	cluster. Manual testing helps validate the functionality and behavior of your changes in a real-world environment.
65	Follow the steps below for manual testing:
66	
67	1. Follow the instructions to [deploy on kind](/docs/developer/quickstart.md#deploy-on-kind).
68	2. Test your changes. Make sure to check the following:
69	   - Logs of the `nginx-gateway` container. Look out for unexpected error logs or panics.
70	
71	     ```shell
72	     kubectl -n nginx-gateway logs <ngf-pod-name>
73	     ```
74	
75	   - Logs of the `nginx` container. Look for unexpected error logs and verify the access logs are correct.
76	
77	     ```shell
78	     kubectl -n <nginx-pod-namespace> logs <nginx-pod-name>
79	     ```
80	
81	   - The generated nginx config. Make sure it's correct.
82	
83	     ```shell
84	     kubectl exec -it -n <nginx-pod-namespace> <nginx-pod-name> -- nginx -T
85	     ```
86	
87	   - The statuses of the Gateway API Resources. Make sure they look correct.
88	
89	     ```shell
90	     kubectl describe <resource> <resource name>
91	     ```
92	
93	   - NGINX proxies traffic successfully (when applicable).
94	   - [Examples](/examples) work correctly. This will ensure that your changes have not introduced any regressions.
95	
96	> **Note**
97	>
98	> Don't limit yourself to happy path testing. Make an effort to cover various scenarios,
99	> including edge cases and potential error conditions. By testing a wide range of scenarios,
100	> you can uncover hidden issues and ensure the robustness of your changes.
101	
102	Performing manual testing helps guarantee the stability, reliability, and effectiveness of your changes before
103	submitting them for review and integration into the project.
104	
105	
106	## Gateway API Conformance Testing
107	
108	To run Gateway API conformance tests, please follow the instructions on [this](/tests/README.md#conformance-testing) page.
109

# Testing

This document provides guidelines for testing, including instructions on running the unit tests, accessing the code
coverage report, performing manual testing, and running the conformance tests. By following these guidelines, you will
gain a thorough understanding of the project's approach to unit testing, enabling you to ensure code quality, validate
functionality, and maintain robust test coverage.

## Unit Test Guidelines

In our testing approach, we employ a combination of Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) style tests and traditional unit
tests. The choice of testing style depends on the nature of the code being tested. Here's a breakdown of our testing
practices:

**All exported interfaces must be covered by BDD style tests**: We use the [Ginkgo](https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/)
testing framework, which enables us to write expressive and readable tests that focus on the behavior of our code.
Additionally, we use the [Gomega](https://onsi.github.io/gomega/) matcher library to provide powerful assertions and
expectations within our BDD style tests.

**Most testing should be done at the exported interface layer**: By writing tests at the exported interface layer, we
ensure that the tests remain decoupled from the internal implementation details. This allows us to refactor and modify
the implementation of the interface without needing to extensively update the tests. It promotes flexibility and
maintainability in our codebase.

**Use standard unit tests to cover gaps**:  While we primarily focus on testing at the exported interface layer, we
acknowledge the importance of comprehensive test coverage. If we identify areas that require additional testing or if
the exported interface layer doesn't provide sufficient coverage, we typically use unit tests to cover these gaps. This
ensures that critical code paths and edge cases are thoroughly tested. We still use
the [Gomega](https://onsi.github.io/gomega/) matcher library for assertions within these tests.

**Use table-driven tests**: When testing multiple cases for a single function or method, we prefer to use table-driven
tests. For BDD style tests, use [DescribeTable](https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/#table-specs) and for standard unit tests,
use [subtests](https://go.dev/blog/subtests).

**Generate test mocks**: To facilitate the generation of mocks for testing, we use
the [Counterfeiter](https://github.com/maxbrunsfeld/counterfeiter) tool. Counterfeiter helps us create mock
implementations of internal and public interfaces, allowing us to isolate and control dependencies during testing. It
simplifies the process of mocking and stubbing, making our tests more robust and flexible.

**Parallelize unit tests**: In general, all tests should be designed to run in parallel for faster execution and help uncover bugs. For standard Go tests, this requires adding `t.Parallel()` to every test and subtest. Ginkgo tests, on the other hand, automatically run in parallel without the need for additional configuration. If a component under test requires sequential execution, you can run tests sequentially by using an [ordered container](https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/#ordered-containers) for Ginkgo tests or by omitting `t.Parallel()` from the go test or subtest. In such cases, it’s essential to include a comment explaining why parallel execution is not possible.

By combining BDD style tests, unit tests, and mock generation, we aim to achieve a comprehensive and maintainable
testing strategy. This approach enables us to ensure the correctness, reliability, and flexibility of our codebase while
promoting efficient refactoring and continuous development.

### Running the Unit Tests

To run the unit tests, run the make unit-test command from the project's root directory:

```makefile
make unit-test
```

This command runs the unit tests with the `-race` flag, enabling the detection of potential data races.

#### Viewing Code Coverage Report

The unit tests generate a code coverage file named `cover.html` in the project's root directory. To view the code
coverage report, open the `cover.html` file in your browser. The report provides insights into which parts of the code
are covered by the tests and helps identify areas that may require additional testing.

## Manual Testing

To ensure the quality and correctness of your changes, it is essential to perform manual testing in a Kubernetes
cluster. Manual testing helps validate the functionality and behavior of your changes in a real-world environment.
Follow the steps below for manual testing:

1. Follow the instructions to [deploy on kind](/docs/developer/quickstart.md#deploy-on-kind).
2. Test your changes. Make sure to check the following:
   - Logs of the `nginx-gateway` container. Look out for unexpected error logs or panics.

     ```shell
     kubectl -n nginx-gateway logs <ngf-pod-name>
     ```

   - Logs of the `nginx` container. Look for unexpected error logs and verify the access logs are correct.

     ```shell
     kubectl -n <nginx-pod-namespace> logs <nginx-pod-name>
     ```

   - The generated nginx config. Make sure it's correct.

     ```shell
     kubectl exec -it -n <nginx-pod-namespace> <nginx-pod-name> -- nginx -T
     ```

   - The statuses of the Gateway API Resources. Make sure they look correct.

     ```shell
     kubectl describe <resource> <resource name>
     ```

   - NGINX proxies traffic successfully (when applicable).
   - [Examples](/examples) work correctly. This will ensure that your changes have not introduced any regressions.

> **Note**
>
> Don't limit yourself to happy path testing. Make an effort to cover various scenarios,
> including edge cases and potential error conditions. By testing a wide range of scenarios,
> you can uncover hidden issues and ensure the robustness of your changes.

Performing manual testing helps guarantee the stability, reliability, and effectiveness of your changes before
submitting them for review and integration into the project.


## Gateway API Conformance Testing

To run Gateway API conformance tests, please follow the instructions on [this](/tests/README.md#conformance-testing) page.

1	# NGINX Gateway Fabric Testing
2	
3	## Overview
4	
5	This directory contains the tests for NGINX Gateway Fabric. The tests are divided into two categories:
6	
7	1. Conformance Testing. This is to ensure that the NGINX Gateway Fabric conforms to the Gateway API specification.
8	2. System Testing. This is to ensure that the NGINX Gateway Fabric works as expected in a real system.
9

44	
45	## Prerequisites
46	
47	- Kubernetes cluster.
48	- [kind](https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/).
49	- Docker.
50	- Golang.
51	- [yq](https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/#install)
52	- Make.
53	
54	If running NFR tests:
55	
56	- The [gcloud CLI](https://cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/install)
57	- A GKE cluster (if `master-authorized-networks` is enabled, please set `ADD_VM_IP_AUTH_NETWORKS=true` in your vars.env file)
58	- Access to GCP Service Account with Kubernetes admin permissions
59	
60	All the commands below are executed from the `tests` directory. You can see all the available commands by running `make help`.
61	
62	## Common steps for all tests
63	
64	### Step 1 - Create a Kubernetes cluster
65	
66	**Important**: Functional tests can only be run on a `kind` cluster. Conformance tests can be run on `kind` or OpenShift clusters (see [OPENSHIFT_CONFORMANCE.md](OPENSHIFT_CONFORMANCE.md) for OpenShift instructions). NFR and longevity tests can only be run on a GKE cluster.
67	
68	To create a local `kind` cluster:
69	
70	```makefile
71	make create-kind-cluster
72	```
73	
74	> Note: The default kind cluster deployed is the latest available version. You can specify a different version by
75	> defining the kind image to use through the KIND_IMAGE variable, e.g.
76	
77	```makefile
78	make create-kind-cluster KIND_IMAGE=kindest/node:v1.27.3
79	```
80	
81	To create a GKE cluster:
82	
83	Before running the below `make` command, copy the `scripts/vars.env-example` file to `scripts/vars.env` and populate the
84	required env vars. `GKE_SVC_ACCOUNT` needs to be the name of a service account that has Kubernetes admin permissions,
85	and `GKE_NODES_SERVICE_ACCOUNT` needs to be the name of a service account that has `Artifact Registry Reader`,
86	`Kubernetes Engine Node Service Account` and `Monitoring Viewer` permissions.
87	
88	```makefile
89	make create-gke-cluster
90	```
91	
92	> Note: The GKE cluster is created with `master-authorized-networks`, meaning only IPs from explicitly allowed CIDR ranges
93	> will be able to access the cluster. The script will automatically add your current IP to the authorized list, but if
94	> your IP changes, you can add your new local IP to the `master-authorized-networks` of the cluster by running the
95	> following:
96	
97	```makefile
98	make add-local-ip-to-cluster
99	```
100	
101	> Note: If you already have a GKE cluster and your public IP has changed, update the firewall rule to include your new client IP.
102	> This restores connectivity when you’re unable to reach the VM.
103	
104	```makefile
105	make update-firewall-with-local-ip
106	```
107	
108	### Step 2 - Build and Load Images
109	
110	Loading the images only applies to a `kind` cluster. If using GKE, see below
111	
112	```makefile
113	make build-images load-images TAG=$(whoami)
114	```
115	
116	Or, to build NGF with NGINX Plus enabled (NGINX Plus cert and key must exist in the root of the repo):
117	
118	```makefile
119	make build-images-with-plus load-images-with-plus TAG=$(whoami)
120	```
121	
122	For the telemetry test, which requires a OTel collector, build an image with the following variables set:
123	
124	```makefile
125	TELEMETRY_ENDPOINT=otel-collector-opentelemetry-collector.collector.svc.cluster.local:4317 TELEMETRY_ENDPOINT_INSECURE=true
126	```
127	
128	#### GKE
129	
130	If running tests on GKE, you will need to tag and push your images to a registry that is accessible from GKE. When building images to run on GKE, you'll need to specify `GOARCH=amd64` in the build command if your local system doesn't default to that architecture.
131	
132	If running the longevity tests manually for a release (not using pipeline), you should use the `-rc` images that were pushed as part of the release branch pipeline instead. For example, in your `vars.env` file
133	
134	```text
135	TAG=release-2.3-rc
136	PREFIX=ghcr.io/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric
137	NGINX_PREFIX=ghcr.io/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/nginx
138	NGINX_PLUS_PREFIX=us-docker.pkg.dev/<GCP-PROJECT-ID>/nginx-gateway-fabric/nginx-plus
139	```
140	
141	## Conformance Testing
142	
143	### Step 1 - Install NGINX Gateway Fabric to configured kind cluster
144	
145	> Note: If you want to run the latest conformance tests from the Gateway API `main` branch, set the following
146	> environment variable before deploying NGF:
147	
148	```bash
149	 export GW_API_VERSION=main
150	```
151	
152	> Otherwise, the latest stable version will be used by default.
153	> Additionally, if you want to run conformance tests with experimental features enabled, set the following
154	> environment variable before deploying NGF:
155	
156	```bash
157	 export ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL=true
158	```
159	
160	> If you want to run the Inference conformance tests, set the following environment variable before deploying NGF:
161	
162	```bash
163	export ENABLE_INFERENCE_EXTENSION=true
164	```
165	
166	#### Option 1 - Build and install NGINX Gateway Fabric from local to configured kind cluster
167	
168	```makefile
169	make install-ngf-local-build
170	```
171	
172	Or, to install NGF with NGINX Plus enabled (NGINX Plus cert and key must exist in the root of the repo):
173	
174	```makefile
175	make install-ngf-local-build-with-plus
176	```
177	
178	#### Option 2 - Install NGINX Gateway Fabric from local already built image to configured kind cluster
179	
180	You can optionally skip the actual _build_ step.
181	
182	```makefile
183	make install-ngf-local-no-build
184	```
185	
186	Or, to install NGF with NGINX Plus enabled:
187	
188	```makefile
189	make install-ngf-local-no-build-with-plus
190	```
191	
192	### Step 2 - Build conformance test runner image
193	
194	> Note: If you want to run the latest conformance tests from the Gateway API `main` branch, run the following
195	> make command to update the Go modules to `main` in both the root and tests modules:
196	
197	```makefile
198	make update-go-modules
199	```
200	
201	> You can also point to a specific fork/branch by running:
202	
203	```bash
204	go mod edit -replace=sigs.k8s.io/gateway-api=<your-fork>@<your-branch>
205	go mod download
206	go mod verify
207	go mod tidy
208	```
209	
210	> Otherwise, the latest stable version will be used by default.
211	
212	```makefile
213	make build-test-runner-image
214	```
215	
216	### Step 3 - Deploy MetalLB to the kind cluster
217	
218	#### To deploy MetalLB to the kind cluster
219	
220	> This is needed to assign external IPs to the Loadbalancer Services spun up in the conformance test.
221	> If your cluster can already do this, it is okay to skip.
222	
223	```makefile
224	make deploy-metallb
225	```
226	
227	### Step 4 - Run Conformance tests
228	
229	#### To run Gateway conformance tests
230	
231	```makefile
232	make run-conformance-tests
233	```
234	
235	#### To run Inference conformance tests
236	
237	```makefile
238	make run-inference-conformance-tests
239	```
240	
241	### Step 5 - Cleanup the conformance test fixtures and uninstall NGINX Gateway Fabric
242	
243	```makefile
244	make cleanup-conformance-tests
245	```
246	
247	```makefile
248	make uninstall-ngf
249	```
250	
251	### Step 6 - Revert changes to Go modules
252	
253	**Optional** Not required if you aren't running the `main` Gateway API tests.
254	
255	```makefile
256	make reset-go-modules
257	```
258	
259	### Step 7 - Delete kind cluster
260	
261	```makefile
262	make delete-kind-cluster
263	```
264	
265	## System Testing
266	
267	The system tests are meant to be run on a live Kubernetes environment to verify a real system. These
268	are similar to the existing conformance tests, but will verify things such as:
269	
270	- NGF-specific functionality
271	- Non-Functional requirements (NFR) testing (such as performance, scale, longevity, etc.)
272	
273	When running locally (functional tests), the tests create a port-forward from your NGF Pod to localhost using a port chosen by the
274	test framework. Traffic is sent over this port. If running on a GCP VM targeting a GKE cluster (NFR/longevity), the tests will create an
275	internal LoadBalancer service which will receive the test traffic.
276	
277	**Important**: Functional tests can only be run on a `kind` cluster. NFR/longevity tests can only be run on a GKE cluster.
278	
279	Directory structure is as follows:
280	
281	- `framework`: contains utility functions for running the tests
282	- `results`: contains the results files for the NFR tests
283	- `scripts`: contain scripts used to set up the environment and run the tests
284	- `suite`: contains the test files
285	
286	### Logging in tests
287	
288	To log in the tests, use the `GinkgoWriter` interface described here: https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/#logging-output.
289	
290	### Step 1 - Run the tests
291	
292	#### Run the functional tests locally
293	
294	Run the full functional suite. By default this uses 4 parallel processes:
295	
296	```makefile
297	make test TAG=$(whoami)
298	```
299	
300	Or, to run the tests with NGINX Plus enabled:
301	
302	```makefile
303	make test TAG=$(whoami) PLUS_ENABLED=true
304	```
305	
306	`GINKGO_PROCS` controls how many parallel processes Ginkgo uses. Each process is an independent OS process with its own NGF deployment, namespace, and port range. Specs are distributed across them and run concurrently, reducing overall time. Cluster-wide CRDs are installed once before the parallel processes begin, while each process still performs its own per-process NGF install/setup. Set `GINKGO_PROCS` to roughly match the number of specs you intend to run to avoid unnecessary per-process installs.
307	
308	For the graceful recovery tests, use `GINKGO_PROCS=2`. The nginx container and NGF pod restart scenarios run in parallel across two processes, while the node restart scenarios are marked `Serial` and run exclusively one at a time:
309	
310	```makefile
311	make test TAG=$(whoami) GINKGO_LABEL=graceful-recovery GINKGO_PROCS=2
312	```
313	
314	When running a single test with `GINKGO_LABEL`, use `GINKGO_PROCS=1` to avoid installing NGF on processes that receive no specs:
315	
316	```makefile
317	make test TAG=$(whoami) GINKGO_LABEL=telemetry GINKGO_PROCS=1
318	```
319	
320	> The command above doesn't run the telemetry functional test by default, which requires a dedicated invocation because it uses a
321	> specially built image (see above) and it needs to deploy NGF differently from the rest of functional tests.
322	
323	#### Run the NFR tests on a GKE cluster from a GCP VM
324	
325	> Note: if you want to run the longevity tests from the pipeline, skip to the [Longevity section](#longevity-testing).
326	
327	Before running the below `make` commands, copy the `scripts/vars.env-example` file to `scripts/vars.env` and populate the
328	required env vars. `GKE_SVC_ACCOUNT` needs to be the name of a service account that has Kubernetes admin permissions.
329	
330	In order to run the tests in GCP, you need a few things:
331	
332	- GKE router to allow egress traffic (used by upgrade tests for pulling images from Github, and scale/reconfig tests for installing prometheus)
333	  - this assumes that your GKE cluster is using private nodes. If using public nodes, you don't need this.
334	- GCP VM and firewall rule to send ingress traffic to GKE
335	
336	To just set up the VM with no router (this will not run the tests):
337	
338	```makefile
339	make create-and-setup-vm
340	```
341	
342	To set up just the router:
343	
344	```makefile
345	make create-gke-router
346	```
347	
348	Otherwise, you can set up the VM, router, and run the tests with a single command. See the options below.
349	
350	By default, the tests run using the version of NGF that was `git cloned` during the setup. If you want to make
351	incremental changes and copy your local changes to the VM to test, you can run
352	
353	```makefile
354	make sync-files-to-vm
355	```
356	
357	> Note: if just running longevity tests, skip to the [Longevity section](#longevity-testing).
358	
359	To set up the GCP environment with the router and VM and then run the tests, run the following command:
360	
361	```makefile
362	make setup-gcp-and-run-nfr-tests
363	```
364	
365	To use an existing VM to run the tests, run the following
366	
367	```makefile
368	make nfr-test
369	```
370	
371	##### Longevity testing
372	
373	This test is run on its own due to its long-running nature. It will run for 3 days (as defined in `suite/scripts/longevity-wrk.sh`) before
374	the tester must collect the results and complete the test.
375	
376	To run in the pipeline, [run the workflow](https://github.com/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/actions/workflows/longevity-start.yml) to start the tests. Once the workflow completes, the job ID will be included in the summary. This must be used as input when stopping the longevity tests.
377	
378	After 3 days (72h) from the time that the startup workflow **finished**, visit the [GCP Monitoring Dashboards](https://console.cloud.google.com/monitoring/dashboards) page and select the `NGF Longevity Test` dashboard. Update the `cluster_name` filter to the names of the longevity clusters. Take PNG screenshots of each chart for the time period in which your test ran, and save those to be added to the results file. Then you can [stop the longevity tests](https://github.com/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/actions/workflows/longevity-stop.yml). If done too early, the traffic will still be flowing and results may not be collected properly, so be sure to wait the full time period.
379	
380	The final workflow will tear down the test and open a PR with the results. The PNGs you took should be added, and any summaries as well. Combine any results files if necessary. If you don't want to open a PR, you can toggle it off in the input when running the workflow.
381	
382	
383	For running manually instead of using the pipeline, you can start the tests with
384	
385	```makefile
386	make start-longevity-test
387	```
388	
389	and stop them with
390	
391	```makefile
392	make stop-longevity-test
393	```
394	
395	<!--  -->
396	> Note if running from your machine instead of the pipeline: If you want to change the time period for which the test runs, update the `wrk` commands in `suite/scripts/longevity-wrk.sh` to the time period you want, and run `make sync-files-to-vm`.
397	<!--  -->
398	
399	> Note if running from your machine instead of the pipeline: If you want to re-run the longevity test, you need to clear out the `cafe.example.com` entry from the `/etc/hosts` file on your VM.
400	
401	###### WAF+PLM longevity scenario
402	
403	The longevity test optionally includes a WAF+PLM scenario that runs alongside the standard longevity test. It deploys a second NGF release (`ngf-longevity-waf`) using the `nginx-plus-f5waf` image and the F5 WAF Policy Lifecycle Manager (PLM), then sustains clean and attack traffic for the duration of the run.
404	
405	**Requirements:**
406	- NGINX Plus with NAP WAF images (amd64 only — not supported on arm64)
407	- Access to `private-registry.nginx.com` (used to pull PLM and WAF sidecar images)
408	- A `dockerconfig.jwt` file at the repo root (registry pull secret for `private-registry.nginx.com`)
409	- A `license.jwt` file at the repo root (NGINX Plus billing/reporting JWT)
410	
411	**In the pipeline:** Enable the WAF scenario by setting the `waf_plm_enabled` input to `true` when triggering the [longevity-start workflow](https://github.com/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/actions/workflows/longevity-start.yml). The WAF scenario only runs for the `plus` matrix job; it is automatically skipped for the `oss` job.
412	
413	**Manually:** Place `dockerconfig.jwt` at the repo root (the default location for `REGISTRY_JWT_FILE`), then run:
414	
415	```makefile
416	make start-longevity-test PLUS_ENABLED=true WAF_PLM_ENABLED=true
417	```
418	
419	If your `dockerconfig.jwt` is elsewhere, override the variable explicitly:
420	
421	```makefile
422	make start-longevity-test PLUS_ENABLED=true WAF_PLM_ENABLED=true REGISTRY_JWT_FILE=/path/to/dockerconfig.jwt
423	```
424	
425	The setup (`longevity-setup` label) will:
426	1. Create the image pull secret in the `plm` namespace from `dockerconfig.jwt`
427	2. Install PLM (`f5-waf-policy-controller` Helm chart) into the `plm` namespace
428	3. Install the `ngf-longevity-waf` NGF Helm release with `gatewayClassName: nginx-waf` and unique TLS secret names to avoid colliding with the standard longevity release
429	4. Apply WAF application resources to the `longevity-waf` namespace (APPolicy, APLogConf, WAFPolicy, Gateway, HTTPRoutes, CronJobs)
430	5. Wait for the WAFPolicy to reach `Accepted` state — confirming PLM compiled the bundle and NGF loaded it into the data plane
431	
432	The `suite/scripts/longevity-wrk-waf.sh` script is started automatically and runs for the duration of the test. It sends clean traffic to `/coffee` and `/tea` on `waf.example.com`, and periodically sends XSS and SQLi attack probes. Attack results are written to `~/waf-attacks.txt` in CSV format — a `blocked=true` entry for every row confirms the WAF is enforcing correctly.
433	
434	> Note: The WAF uses NAP WAF's default block response (HTTP 200 with a "Request Rejected" body). Attack probes are detected as blocked by checking for this string in the response body.
435	
436	At teardown (`longevity-teardown` label), the results file will include:
437	- `## WAF Traffic` — wrk summaries for clean traffic on `/coffee` and `/tea`
438	- `## WAF Attack Results` — a count of blocked probes and a table of any unexpected (unblocked) rows. If all probes were blocked, a single summary line is written instead.
439	
440	> Note if running from your machine instead of the pipeline: If you want to re-run the WAF longevity test, you need to clear out the `waf.example.com` entry from the `/etc/hosts` file on your VM in addition to the `cafe.example.com` entry.
441	
442	#### Run the WAF tests on a GKE cluster
443	
444	WAF tests require NGINX Plus with NAP WAF images and run on GKE (amd64 only). Before running:
445	
446	1. Ensure you have access to `private-registry.nginx.com` and a `dockerconfig.jwt` file at the repo root (used to create the image pull secret).
447	
448	2. Run the WAF tests, passing the required variables directly:
449	
450	   ```makefile
451	   make test-waf-gke TAG=$(whoami) PLUS_USAGE_ENDPOINT=<endpoint> GKE_PROJECT=<project>
452	   ```
453	
454	   This will compile the WAF policy bundles from the JSON sources in `suite/manifests/waf-policy/`, create the image pull secret in the `nginx-gateway` namespace so the WAF sidecar images (`waf-enforcer`, `waf-config-mgr`) can be pulled from `private-registry.nginx.com`, and run the tests labelled `waf` against the GKE cluster.
455	
456	> Note: For the WAF longevity scenario, see the [WAF+PLM longevity scenario](#wafplm-longevity-scenario) section above.
457	
458	### Common test amendments
459	
460	To run all tests with the label "my-label", use the GINKGO_LABEL variable:
461	
462	```makefile
463	make test TAG=$(whoami) GINKGO_LABEL=my-label
464	```
465	
466	or to pass a specific flag, e.g. run a specific test, use the GINKGO_FLAGS variable:
467	
468	```makefile
469	make test TAG=$(whoami) GINKGO_FLAGS='-ginkgo.focus "writes the system info to a results file"'
470	```
471	
472	> Note: if filtering on NFR tests, set the filter in the appropriate field in your `vars.env` file.
473	
474	If you are running the tests in GCP, add your required label/ flags to `scripts/var.env`.
475	
476	You can also modify the tests code for a similar outcome. To run a specific test, you can "focus" it by adding the `F`
477	prefix to the name. For example:
478	
479	```go
480	It("runs some test", func(){
481	    ...
482	})
483	```
484	
485	becomes:
486	
487	```go
488	FIt("runs some test", func(){
489	    ...
490	})
491	```
492	
493	This can also be done at higher levels like `Context`.
494	
495	To disable a specific test, add the `X` prefix to it, similar to the previous example:
496	
497	```go
498	It("runs some test", func(){
499	    ...
500	})
501	```
502	
503	becomes:
504	
505	```go
506	XIt("runs some test", func(){
507	    ...
508	})
509	```
510	
511	For more information of filtering specs, see [the docs here](https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/#filtering-specs).
512	
513	### Step 2 - Cleanup
514	
515	1. Delete kind cluster, if required
516	
517	   ```makefile
518	   make delete-kind-cluster
519	   ```
520	
521	2. Delete the GCP components (GKE cluster, GKE router, VM, and firewall rule), if required
522	
523	   ```makefile
524	   make cleanup-gcp
525	   ```
526	
527	   or
528	
529	   ```makefile
530	   make cleanup-router
531	   ```
532	
533	   ```makefile
534	   make cleanup-vm
535	   ```
536	
537	   ```makefile
538	   make delete-gke-cluster
539	   ```
